---
title: "uRos 2026: Registration open until September 15th: book your spot!"
author: "Anna Smyk"
date: "2026-07-02"
categories: [Talks on JD+]
image: "logo-uros.png"
---

This is an [uRos 2026 (Use of R in Official Statistics)](https://r-project.ro/conference2026.html) update:

- call for abstracts is closed now, we had a record number of submissions, thank you for your great response !

- we will have three rooms allowing parallel sessions on the three days

- notification of acceptance will be issued on July 20th

- draft program will follow

- you are, of course, warmly invited to join us in Paris even if you won't present ! 

- if you want to attend (as a presenter or not) you must complete registration before September 15th 
following the procedure outlined at [https://r-project.ro/conference2026.html#Registration](https://r-project.ro/conference2026.html#Registration) and pay the 330 euro registration fee (including lunches, networking cocktail and coffee breaks).

**Spots are limited, so book yours as early as possible !**

Looking forward to meeting you in Paris !

[](Flyer uRos-01.png)
